expected_values.message: I have a linear scar on the back of my head and would like to know if scalp micropigmentation can help conceal it. I am interested in a price range and available procedure dates in August.

tasks.instruction: Use the instant quote tool for a male client with no previous procedures, start with the full scalp area selected, and if the estimate is outside the $2,000–$3,000 range, change the treatment area to cover only the crown and hairline until the estimate falls within that range, then save the quote.
